case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. MUOI TRAN et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, MUOI DOES  1TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-08-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC SERVED MAR-30-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, MUOI
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $385.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TRAN, MUOI
DECLARATION KURITSS A. JACOBS FILED RE: COMPUTATION OF INTEREST AND LACKOF ORIGINAL EXECUTED AGREEMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
